import React from 'react'; import { BarChart, LineChart, PieChart, Bar, Line, Pie, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, Legend, ResponsiveContainer, Cell, Radar, RadarChart, PolarGrid, PolarAngleAxis, PolarRadiusAxis } from 'recharts'; interface SkillData { name: string; score: number; target: number; } interface ProgressData { date: string; score: number; } interface CategoryData { name: string; value: number; [key: string]: any; } interface Achievement { id: number; title: string; description: string; earned: boolean; points: number; } interface RecentActivity { id: number; title: string; description: string; time: string; type: 'completed' | 'achievement' | 'new' | 'points'; points?: number; } const PerformanceDashboard: React.FC = () => { // Mock data for charts const skillData: SkillData[] = [ { name: 'Client Interaction', score: 85, target: 90 }, { name: 'Legal Research', score: 78, target: 85 }, { name: 'Document Drafting', score: 92, target: 90 }, { name: 'Oral Advocacy', score: 76, target: 80 }, { name: 'Negotiation', score: 88, target: 85 }, { name: 'Ethics', score: 95, target: 95 }, ]; const progressData: ProgressData[] = [ { date: 'Jan', score: 65 }, { date: 'Feb', score: 70 }, { date: 'Mar', score: 72 }, { date: 'Apr', score: 75 }, { date: 'May', score: 78 }, { date: 'Jun', score: 82 }, { date: 'Jul', score: 85 }, ]; const categoryData: CategoryData[] = [ { name: 'Criminal Law', value: 35 }, { name: 'Civil Law', value: 25 }, { name: 'Corporate Law', value: 20 }, { name: 'Family Law', value: 15 }, { name: 'Constitutional Law', value: 5 }, ]; const radarData = [ { subject: 'Research', A: 120, B: 110, fullMark: 150 }, { subject: 'Writing', A: 98, B: 130, fullMark: 150 }, { subject: 'Advocacy', A: 86, B: 130, fullMark: 150 }, { subject: 'Negotiation', A: 99, B: 100, fullMark: 150 }, { subject: 'Analysis', A: 85, B: 90, fullMark: 150 }, { subject: 'Ethics', A: 65, B: 85, fullMark: 150 }, ]; const COLORS = ['#4F46E5', '#10B981', '#F59E0B', '#EF4444', '#8B5CF6']; const achievements: Achievement[] = [ { id: 1, title: 'First Scenario Completed', description: 'Complete your first legal scenario', earned: true, points: 100 }, { id: 2, title: 'Perfect Argumentation', description: 'Achieve 100% in argumentation skills', earned: true, points: 500 }, { id: 3, title: 'Speed Demon', description: 'Complete a scenario in under 30 minutes', earned: false, points: 300 }, { id: 4, title: 'Research Master', description: 'Score 90%+ in legal research', earned: true, points: 400 }, { id: 5, title: 'Consistency King', description: 'Complete 10 scenarios in a row', earned: false, points: 750 }, { id: 6, title: 'Top Performer', description: 'Rank in top 10% of users', earned: false, points: 1000 }, ]; const recentActivity: RecentActivity[] = [ { id: 1, title: 'Completed Contract Drafting Scenario', description: 'Scored 92% in document drafting skills', time: '2 hours ago', type: 'completed', points: 150 }, { id: 2, title: 'Achievement Unlocked', description: 'Perfect Argumentation badge earned', time: '1 day ago', type: 'achievement', points: 500 }, { id: 3, title: 'New Scenario Available', description: 'Cross-Examination of Expert Witness', time: '2 days ago', type: 'new' }, { id: 4, title: 'Points Earned', description: '1st place in Criminal Law Tournament', time: '3 days ago', type: 'points', points: 5000 }, { id: 5, title: 'Completed Evidence Law Scenario', description: 'Scored 88% in evidence analysis', time: '4 days ago', type: 'completed', points: 120 }, ]; const getIconForActivity = (type: string) => { switch (type) { case 'completed': return (
); case 'achievement': return (
); case 'new': return (
); case 'points': return (
); default: return (
); } }; // Fix the label function type const renderCustomizedLabel = ({ name, percent }: any) => { return `${name}: ${(percent * 100).toFixed(0)}%`; }; return (
